subtitle: A personalized retirement celebration
bigline: Every spin celebrates a career well done.

welcome.title: Welcome!
paragraphs: This personalized retirement slot celebration was created especially for you.
You have 5 official spins, and every official spin is a win.
The eTA Team wanted to make this retirement a little more memorable.
welcome.overrideLine: Helen is reviewing today's celebration paperwork.

rules: Every official spin is a win.
You have 5 official spins to enjoy.
Any gifts or cash are supplied by the sender, not Playable Greetings.
Share your final celebration with the sender if you like.

finale.title: 🎉 Official Retirement Result
finale.note: Congratulations on your retirement! The eTA Team hopes this celebration brings a smile and reminds you how much you are appreciated.

footer: Created with appreciation by The eTA Team.

claim.template: Any gifts are provided by The eTA Team.

auditor.name: Helen
lines: Helen is reviewing today's celebration paperwork.
Helen requested one final retirement checklist.
Helen has stamped this retirement APPROVED.

officialSpins.title: A Great Beginning
officialSpins.message: Welcome to a celebration created especially for your retirement. Every spin today is a winner.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Helen is reviewing today's celebration paperwork.

officialSpins.title: Smile Break
officialSpins.message: May there always be time for another game of Ping Pong and another reason to smile.

officialSpins.title: Made For You
officialSpins.message: Your coworkers on the eTA Team wanted to celebrate this milestone with something created just for you.
officialSpins.auditorLine: Helen requested one final retirement checklist.

officialSpins.title: Take The Moment
officialSpins.message: This moment exists because people wanted to recognize everything you have accomplished. Enjoy it.

officialSpins.title: 777 Bonus Unlocked
officialSpins.message: Jackpot! Three bonus spins have been unlocked. The celebration continues!
officialSpins.auditorLine: Helen has stamped this retirement APPROVED.

bonusNoCash.title: Extra Surprise
bonusNoCash.message: Here's one more reason to smile. Perhaps another round of Ping Pong is waiting soon.

bonusNoCash.title: More To Celebrate
bonusNoCash.message: Retirement opens the door to new adventures, quiet moments, and happy surprises.

bonusNoCash.title: Lasting Memories
bonusNoCash.message: The best prize is knowing your work mattered and your teammates wanted to celebrate you today.
